sqlMap.select: SELECT openflag FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO WHERE docid = #docId#
SELECT href FROM TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docid WHERE TBL_OPENGOVDOCINFO.docid = #docId# AND openflag <> '3';

SELECT attachfilehref FROM TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ON TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.docid AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = TBL_ENDATTACHINFO.attachfilesn WHERE TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.docid = #docId# AND TBL_OPENGOVFILEINFO.sn = #sn# AND fileopenflag = 'Y'
